mapper.insert: insert into BSC_INSTITUTIONINDUSTRY (VC_COMPANY_CODE, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_END_DATE, L_TYPE_NO, VC_ONE_CODE, VC_ONE_NAME, VC_TWO_CODE, VC_TWO_NAME, VC_THREE_CODE, VC_THREE_NAME, VC_FOUR_CODE, VC_FOUR_NAME, C_NEW_EQUITY, C_FIRST_INCOME, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME) values (#{vcCompanyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lBeginDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lEndDate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lTypeNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcOneCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcOneName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcTwoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcTwoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcThreeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcThreeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFourCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcFourName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cNewEquity,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cFirstIncome,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{dUpdatetime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{etlTime,jdbcType=DATE})
mapper.select: select VC_COMPANY_CODE, L_BEGIN_DATE, L_END_DATE, L_TYPE_NO, VC_ONE_CODE, VC_ONE_NAME, VC_TWO_CODE, VC_TWO_NAME, VC_THREE_CODE, VC_THREE_NAME, VC_FOUR_CODE, VC_FOUR_NAME, C_NEW_EQUITY, C_FIRST_INCOME, D_UPDATETIME, ETL_TIME from BSC_INSTITUTIONINDUSTRY
